title: Scheduler misconfiguration: default partition changed to 'gpu'
summary: After slurm.conf reconfiguration at 08:00 UTC, Default=YES was incorrectly applied to the 'gpu' partition. CPU-only job 910500 was routed to gpu01, occupying the node while wasting all 4 GPUs. standard partition nodes are idle.

timeline.event: Alert: GPU nodes allocated, GPUs idle

notes: Fix: set Default=YES on 'standard', remove from 'gpu' in slurm.conf.
